perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a grey hoodie and black pants falls face-down on the floor of an empty, modern apartment with wooden floors and minimalist cabinetry, looking completely exhausted. (2) The scene cuts to a clothing rack where she is picking out a hoodie. (3) She is seen in an office setting with three other women who are eating; she takes pieces of their food. (4) She crawls under a desk to grab bags of snacks. (5) She applies lipstick in a crowded vanity area. (6) She kneels by a drawer filled with toiletries and office supplies, stuffing them into her black bag. (7) At a water dispenser, she fills a large plastic bottle, looking around suspiciously. (8) She is seen plugging a charger into a wall outlet. (9) She enters a toilet stall, grabs a whole roll of toilet paper, and runs away. (10) In a bathroom, she meticulously folds and uses a tiny piece of toilet paper, then picks up used scraps from the sink to reuse.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic pop music starts and continues through most of the video. (2) Ambient office noises and the sound of a water dispenser filling are briefly audible over the music. (3) A loud, sharp male voice shouts '罗禁慾!' (Luo Jinyu!) off-camera, causing a momentary pause in the rhythmic flow. (4) The music continues until the final scene where the woman speaks in a soft, serious tone saying '這還可以用' (This can still be used).
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 'POV: 用盡全力買房裝潢後' (POV: After putting all effort into buying and decorating a house) - Hook/Context. (2) '衣服，公司的' (Clothes, from the company) - Explanatory. (3) '三餐，同事的' (Three meals, from colleagues) - Explanatory. (4) '零食，公司的' (Snacks, from the company) - Explanatory. (5) '化妝品，公司的' (Cosmetics, from the company) - Explanatory. (6) '公用品，公司的' (Office supplies, from the company) - Explanatory. (7) '水，公司的' (Water, from the company) - Explanatory. (8) '電，公司的' (Electricity, from the company) - Explanatory. (9) '衛生紙，公司的' (Toilet paper, from the company) - Explanatory. (10) '衛生紙。正確的使用方法' (Toilet paper. The correct way to use it) - Humorous instructional. (11) '這還可以用' (This can still be used) - Frugal emphasis.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro (Exhaustion) -> Montage of 'stealing' office supplies -> Outro (Extreme frugality demo)

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 3 female colleagues in the eating scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young female with long dark hair, bangs, wearing glasses, a grey oversized hoodie, and black pants.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Empty minimalist apartment with recessed lighting; a busy office with clothing racks and desks; a modern office pantry; a public-style restroom with grey stalls.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright indoor lighting and natural light in the apartment.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To humorously illustrate the extreme and absurd measures of frugality a person might take after spending all their money on a home purchase and renovation, specifically by 'harvesting' every possible resource from their workplace.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: POV format with exaggerated frugal acting.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on cultural tropes regarding the high cost of real estate in urban areas and the resulting 'poor' lifestyle of new homeowners.
